scripts.start: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_API_MODE=development EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 EXPO_PUBLIC_PROVIDER_BASE_PATH=/api/v1/provider EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_NAME="Gonep Provider (Dev)" EXPO_PUBLIC_DEMO_EMAIL= EXPO_PUBLIC_DEMO_PASSWORD= EXPO_PUBLIC_API_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 expo start
